name: Master of Destiny
overview: Kwan Yeuk-nam is a powerful woman. After her husband committed suicide due to a business failure, she single-handedly raised her three sons to adulthood, all whilst establishing her business empire, Sun Hon Lik. Now ready to retire, she is prepared to pass down her empire to her three sons.

trailers.title: 風雲天地 - 第 01 集預告 (TVB)
